review_title: Strong Support and Good Value, with Room for Platform Improvement
description: We have been working with Amenitiz for four years, and for over a year now we have noticed a clear improvement, particularly in support, both in terms of accessibility, with more channels and more days available, and in the competence and professionalism of the operators. Their platform offers an interesting quality-price ratio, but it is held back by an architecture that is not always straightforward or intuitive, and is probably the result of successive layers of development. For this very reason, support plays a key role in preventing mistakes and quickly resolving unexpected and undesirable situations. All in all, they are a dynamic and interesting company, and if they continue investing in making the platform increasingly modern and flexible, they can truly reach a very high level.
author: Alessio B.
pros: It is a comprehensive platform with a range of features and modules that allows you to manage the main aspects of a small to medium-sized tourism business with a good price-quality ratio, from the website and pricing setup to the management of multiple sales channels and communication with guests. Its support is constantly improving in terms of accessibility, as well as quality and effectiveness.
cons: The platform is very complex in its configuration logic, perhaps as a result of successive layers of development without ever undergoing a serious full-scale reengineering. This can easily lead to configuration errors that may cause various kinds of problems and create an overall sense of fragility that does not inspire much confidence. With customer care continuously improving, these negative aspects are being contained and managed, but a radical intervention would be desirable to turn the platform into something far more modern, flexible, and intuitive.

description: We have been using Amenitiz for over 2 years now and we are pleased to say that they have been a very helpful tool to manage our guest house, Paradise Suites, located in Carcavelos, Portugal. During this time, Amenitiz has not only provided us with reliable channel management services but also with lodgement of our website and payment system, among many other services. A full package of services for the right price. We support and recommend Amenitiz to hoteliers, young and old!
author: Zilton N.
pros: The concept of a Service Suite for a management software.
cons: Minor: the fact that the period of stay for each guest is not repeated in all pages and all information popups. We consider that very important.

description: Service outstanding, functionality basic
author: Kathryn T.
pros: Amenitiz made it very easy to set up my website with booking engine. The staff are amazing and so helpful. The support was great and the after care equally as good.
cons: What I am learning now, is that they just use templates and the requests I have done since the website has been set up, have been flatly refused. For example, my calendar isn't very clear, it is all in grey, and my potential guests are messaging saying that I am booked up, because its very unclear. I have asked Amenitiz to colour code my calendar to make it clearer, the answer was NO, that's not possible. My Contact Me form has been targeted by BOTS and the only solution offered is to take my Contact Me form down for a few days, to break the cycle. That's not really portraying a good company image. So I am still targeted by BOTS on email and Whatsapp. I am aware they should look at the Recaptcha score and make it higher to stop the BOTS, but they say its a generic platform they use and can't help me. So, albeit, the service is outstanding, I am now finding out after 6 months, the functionality and help with technical things are very poor. To change the calendar colour is a simple code change, but they cant do it because they are using template from another company.

review_title: A game-changer for managing multiple apartments
description: Overall, my experience has been very positive. Amenitiz has made managing my apartments much easier by centralizing reservations, availability, rates and day-to-day operations in one platform. It has helped me save time, reduce mistakes across channels and stay more organized. The interface is intuitive and it’s a solid solution for anyone managing multiple properties.
author: Francisco F.
pros: I use Amenitiz as my PMS and channel manager to manage multiple apartments, and it has made my day-to-day operations much easier. Having reservations, availability and rates centralized in one place saves time and reduces mistakes across channels. Highly recommended for property managers.
cons: Some advanced features take a bit of time to fully master at the beginning, especially if you manage multiple listings. Also, I’d love to see a few more automation options and reporting customization, but overall it keeps improving

description: They are a very friendly and supportive company who are excellent to deal with. The support is quick and easy to get.
author: Heather C.
pros: My website. It’s amazing, easy to use and my direct bookings have increased dramatically.
cons: At the beginning it was a bit more difficult to get support but this has significantly improved and it’s the best support from any online platform I know.

description: Good support via email or call to resolve glitches with OTAs calendars..
author: Steve K.
pros: Great and timely support on complex matters. Direct booking engine that stays in your website
cons: Booking engine to manage pricing seems unnecessarily complex -too many factors to manage

review_title: Prompt support and uplift in bookings
description: It was a big change for us as we had to redo our website and we had had a bad experience when changing channel manager with a different company previously but I can honestly say it has all been worth it as we have seen an uplift in bookings and we get clear and prompt support to questions that we have to manage our customers needs.
author: Fe D.
pros: As a busy small business owner the support I receive from Amenitiz is great. I can ask for support with any questions that crop up with a member of the support team on an online chat and have my questions answered clearly and in a timely manor. We have defo seen a significant uplift in bookings since switching to Amenitiz due to the rate checker.
cons: It was significantly more expensive than the provider we previously used ( double the cost)

description: Great company with great services. The channel manager is very good and understanding
author: Konstantinos M.
pros: Great company with great services. Both advisors Daniel and Jessica have replied to my questions with professionalism and great response
cons: The mobile app could be better. Quite hard to navigate.

author: Dario S.
pros: Customer service always responds quickly and in an extremely friendly manner, solving the problem...
cons: I had to contact customer service through the auto-responder, who immediately put me in touch with an operator, who, as always, was very kind and helpful.

author: Julie G.
pros: We've been working with Amenitiz for almost 3 years now and the support is just great. Everytime you have a question, you get an answer in the next few minutes. Whether it is their AI, the chat or a call. The everyday use of the extranet is really easy and time-saving. I can only recommend it.
cons: The phone application could be more intuitive but I use it everyday and it does the job. .......................

description: Buen, en general muy bien. Atención correcta, ya que a parte de la IA de ayuda, puedes hablar con humanos muy eficientes, el motor bastante fácil de usar y ágil.
author: Jaume C.
pros: Me gusta la atención al cliente. Son atentos y resolutivos. También que van mejorando detalles del motor a menudo.
cons: De momento no me he encontrado en ninguna situación. Unicamente que han tenido un par de desconnexiones que han resuelto rápido pero inquietan un poco ya que tenemos toda la información de las reservas allí.

description: Siempre que he tenido algún problema, o duda sobre algo, siempre me han atendido con mucha diligencia y corrección, y sobre todo me gusta que hay videoconferencias constantemente para ayudar a resolver nuevos problemas o nuevas soluciones para un montón de cuestiones.
author: José Miguel C.
pros: El servicio es magnífico, así como la atención ante cualquier problema, la resolución es rápida y eficaz.
cons: De momento ninguna desventaja, espero seguir teniendo el mismo trato durante mucho tiempo. Buena disposición siempre para solucionar problemas

description: Suite à un démarchage téléphonique pour souscrire à Amenitiz, la présentation initiale semblait très prometteuse. Tout était clair, fluide et bien vendu. Cependant, lors de l’échange avec le conseiller 4 jours plus tard pour la mise en place de l’outil, de nombreux éléments se sont révélés ne pas correspondre à mes attentes ni à ce qui m’avait été présenté. J’ai donc immédiatement demandé la résiliation, dans le respect du délai légal de rétractation . Depuis, aucun retour de la part d’Amenitiz, malgré plusieurs relances.
author: stéphanie D.
pros: Aucun - par contre la force de vente à distance est au top !
cons: Le service réclamation après vente : aucun retour de tous leurs services après une demande de résiliation dans le délai légal de rétractation
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Rapidez, eficiencia y amabilidad del equipo de soporte técnico
author: Ana F.
pros: La rapidez en resolver dudas y problemas técnicos
cons: Que no he aumentado las reservas directas tanto como quisiera

description: Bien et pourtant déçue. Quand un problème serieux survient on vous ballade entre le robot et le support
author: Martine F.
pros: Qualite de la plateforme. Claire et repondant en toutes securites pour l ensemble des reservations.
cons: Manque de réactivité concernant un probleme urgent. Bien regrettable. Surtout quand on est professionnel on doit répondre dans l efficacité
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Professionalità e supporto che danno ai clienti.
description: Sicuramente una buonissima esperienza......sono cliente di Amenitiz da un pò di anni....e devo dire che è uno dei channel migliori che io abbia trovato.
author: Lucio P.
pros: Sono veramente molto professionali. Oggi ho avuto contatti telefonici con la Sig.na [nascosto contenuto sensibile] ...mi ha aiutato a fare delle operazioni che non avevo mai fatto e non sapevo nemmeno dove iniziare. Tutto si è svolto con semplicità e praticità. Mi ha fatto molto piacere avere il supporto di questo team. Complimenti......ottimo servizio.
cons: Tutto è stato perfetto. Non ho mai avuto difficoltà con il loro modo di lavorare. Non devo e non posso dare giudizi contro.

author: Marisa R.
pros: TRABALHO COM ELES A MAIS DE DOIS ANOS E ELES NAO SABIAM QUE AS INFORMACOES DE AMENITIZ PAY - PAYOUT, ERAM COMPARTILHADAS COM TODOS OS FUNCIOARIOS ATÉ O PESSOAL DA LIMPEZA SABEM QUANTO CAI NA CONTA DOS PROPIETARIOS

review_title: Un outil et un accompagnement précieux!
author: Sophie T.
pros: Excellent support client: aimable, réactif et compétent. Un accompagnement de qualité et de bon conseil.
cons: Le support n'est pas joignable le soir ou le matin tôt... Problématique dans les heures où nous travaillons.

description: pessima, LA PEGGIORE. e io ho il piano a pagamento più completo. Non danni assitenza nè curano le urgenza di sabto e domenica! e per il turismo non aggiungo altro
author: IDA P.
pros: la piattaforma è carina, sembrano molto gentili , ma sono degli incompetenti . Hanno fatto diversi errori ho le mail salvate
cons: Sono degli assoluti incomoetenti: durante una seduta di formazione, LA formatrice , mi ha sbagliato un collegamento con una ota e non sapeva perchè cosa fosse XML che compariva in alto - LA FORMATRICE- per colpa sua ho ricevuto una prenotazione a prezzi stracciati e io le avevo detto di darmi il tempo di impostare il piano tariffario. Ti fanno una formazione a step e quindi se hai urgenza di aprire non sono didposti a dedidarc ipiù di tanto se non con il sipporto telefonico e anche lì.... una ragazzo che mi ha risposto e mi ha impostato una tariffa per agosto ha messo due restrizioni che andavano in confrlitto tra di lor e quindi non si rendeva conto che questo no mi avrebbe peresso di ottenre delle prenotazioni. Inotre , loro non danno assitenza diretta durante i week end, momento in cui lavorando nel settore del turismo problablmente hai più bisogno. E' chiaramente in contraddizione con il settore in cui si lavora e il tipo di assistenza che si decide di dare. Ho un ticket aperto per una problematica aperta ed essendo il sabato e la domenica di mezzo non ho ancora ricevuto assitenza e per colpa loro continuano ad arrivare prenotazioni sbagliate. In tutto ciò io ho un piano plus e pago circa € 100,oo al mese
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Un outil précieux pour les hébergeurs indépendants
description: Des petits bugs irritants depuis 4 ans, comme des cases qui ne fonctionnent (charges factures par exemple) , ou "tout supprimer" dans l'onglet notification qui ne fonctionne toujours pas non plus , .. mais dans l'ensemble cela n'empêche pas la recommandation.
author: Samantha P.
pros: Amenitiz a vraiment simplifié la gestion de mon établissement : site internet, réservations, planning… tout est centralisé et facile à utiliser. L’équipe support est réactive et bienveillante, et les fonctionnalités sont pensées pour nous faire gagner du temps
cons: Les commissions AmenitizPay sont certes un peu élevées, mais c’est un gage de sécurité et de fiabilité. Les paiements s’intègrent automatiquement dans la fiche client, ce qui évite les erreurs et facilite la gestion quotidienne. Un gain de sérénité non négligeable

description: Nous avons eu une très bonne expérience sur amenitiz. La plateforme fonctionne bien, des mises à jours régulières sont faites afin d'améliorer l'expérience client. La service client est très vif.
author: Lucile P.
pros: Le service client est très vif, au moindre problème, nous pouvons rentrer en contact avec un conseiller qui répond à toutes nos questions.
cons: Peut etre le temps de paiement entre le moment de la transaction client et le moment ou on reçoit le montant sur le compte.

review_title: Amenitiz est une société très réactive
description: Amenitiz est une société très réactive et nous sommes ravis de les avoir choisis pour Channel manager ! Tout fonctionne à merveille pour notre établissement et nous le recommandons à 200%
author: Fred P.
pros: C'est fluide, fonctionnel, rapide et l'équipe de support, quand on en a besoin, ce qui est rare, est au top !
cons: Affichage à actualiser parfois quand on ajoute une réservation mais rien d'impactant quand on connait "l'astuce"

description: Positiva, a reserva de lo que puse en lo anterior. Me gusta el tema de stripe y tener un costo bajo por transferencias interbancarias.
author: jesus alberto P.
pros: la atención es rápida y aclaran todas tus dudas. son pacientes los asesores para escuchar tus dudas y darles solución.
cons: cuando migré de channel manager a amenitiz, me desconectaron de booking, quedé a la deriva y no tuve reservas por booking durante 17 días, lo cual yo no pude saber porque amenitiz nunca me advirtió de esa desconexión , hasta que un agente de amenitiz me llamó y me conectó, pero fue un boquete en mis finanzas de ése mes.

description: Desde octubre del año pasado estoy trabajando con Amenitiz. Como motor de reservas es magnífico. Hay muchos detalles en el calendario muy útiles para mejorar la ocupación. Y lo más importante es que se sincronizan todas las plataformas 100%. El equipo es fantástico y recibo ayuda cada vez que lo necesito al instante.
author: Peli H.
pros: Su eficacia como conjunto de todas las tareas diarias a realizar en la gestión y atención.
cons: Lo menos que me gusta es no haberlo descubierto antes. Mi día a día es ahora mucho más fácil. Los primeros meses revisaba todas las reservas de las diferentes plataformas por si acaso. Me generaba más trabajo, pero ahora estoy tranquila porque estoy segura de que funciona y me fío totalmente.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Aline M.
pros: It saved me a lot of time ! It is very easy to use and the team is always very helpful if anything is needed.
cons: Some features you have on your computer don't appear on the phone ( change room for or change date for instance).
